items.title: OpenAI says GPT-5.4's "individual claims are 33% less likely to be false and its full responses are 18% less likely to contain any errors, relative to GPT-5.2" (David Gewirtz/ZDNET)

items.title_bilingual: OpenAI 表示，与 GPT-5.2 相比，GPT-5.4 的“个人声明错误的可能性降低了 33%，完整响应包含任何错误的可能性降低了 18%”（David Gewirtz/ZDNET） / OpenAI says GPT-5.4's "individual claims are 33% less likely to be false and its full responses are 18% less likely to contain any errors, relative to GPT-5.2" (David Gewirtz/ZDNET)
